title: Add real-time notification on issue updates
description:
Hook all update operations to publish NotificationEvent::IssueUpdated. Include field change tracking. Ensure all changes propagate immediately to frontend.

## Implementation Details

### Files to Modify
- rust/src/issue_update.rs::update_issue() (after write_issue_to_file(), line 122)
- rust/src/issue_close.rs::close_issue() (after update_issue() call, line 17)
- rust/src/issue_comment.rs::add_comment() (line 103)
- rust/src/issue_comment.rs::update_comment() (line 143)
- rust/src/issue_comment.rs::delete_comment() (line 165)
- rust/src/dependencies.rs::add_dependency() (line 30)
- rust/src/dependencies.rs::remove_dependency() (line 70)
- rust/src/beads_write.rs::update_beads_issue() (line 320)
- rust/src/beads_write.rs::add_beads_comment() (line 168)
- rust/src/beads_write.rs::update_beads_comment() (line 229)
- rust/src/beads_write.rs::delete_beads_comment() (line 276)

### Pattern
```rust
// After successful update
publish_notification(NotificationEvent::IssueUpdated {
    issue_id: issue.id.clone(),
    fields_changed: vec!["status".to_string()],
    issue_data: issue.clone(),
})?;
```

### Testing
1. kbs update <issue-id> --status in_progress
2. Verify: Status updates on board within 100ms
3. kbs comment <issue-id> "Test comment"
4. Verify: Comment appears immediately

### Dependencies
Requires notification infrastructure from parent epic.
creator: ryan.porter
